gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with a welcoming posture, arms open wide, and gestures toward the colorful blocks on the screen.
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head, and raises their hand while inviting guesses about the total number of blocks.
a tutor points with one hand to the first group and counts softly while moving the other hand to emphasize five blocks.
a person gestures toward the second group with excitement, raising both hands briefly before bringing them together to signify addition.
a tutor steps back slightly, spreading arms wide as if gathering all the blocks together, encouraging students to count aloud.
a person enthusiastically points downwards for each number, moving their arms up and down in rhythm while counting with the class.
a tutor raises both arms triumphantly, smiling broadly while celebrating the total of ten blocks with the students.
a person invites with open palms and gentle nods, encouraging students to practice adding different groups of objects at home.
